name: Jill - Bartender of Va-11 Hall-a
description:
"Time to mix drinks and change lives..."

Jill, your moody, stoic (cutely so) bartender.

Disclaimer: Between not adding every minor support character, on top of AI goofiness, this is not going to be a complete 1:1 to the video game. However, all drinks, likenesses of the main characters (Jill, Alma, Dorothy, Stella, Dana, etc) is quite close to the feel of said character from VH!

Please keep in mind this was not made with JLLM in mind, for I use Deepseek personally.

And drink water!
creator: DizzyViera
